𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗠𝗜𝗡𝗔𝗟 | To provide an advanced, self-hosted trading interface for Polymarket, enabling active traders to monitor markets, analyze trader performance, and execute trades with enhanced efficiency and control.  ✨ Notable!

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide an advanced, self-hosted trading interface for Polymarket, enabling active traders to monitor markets, analyze trader performance, and execute trades with enhanced efficiency and control.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Self-hosted Polymarket trading terminal
✅ Bloomberg-style dark UI
✅ Sub-second order book via SSE
✅ Full trader leaderboard drill-down
✅ Self-custodial order execution
✅ No third-party relayer or builder credentials
✅ Keyboard navigation and trader view
✅ Live order book via SSE with client-side delta application
✅ Live-ticking price chart
✅ Markets view with infinite scroll and full-text search
✅ Traders view with leaderboards and detailed profiles
✅ Optional wallet connection (MetaMask) for trading
✅ Two trading modes: EOA and Safe mode


▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐ 56 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 14 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 0 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides an open-source, self-hosted trading terminal for Polymarket, offering a Bloomberg-style dark UI with real-time order book data via SSE and self-custodial trading execution. It aims to enhance the user experience for active traders by providing advanced features like detailed trader leaderboards and keyboard navigation, all without third-party relayer fees or backend secrets.

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/humanplane/terminal

𝗕𝗟𝗔𝗖𝗞𝗖𝗔𝗡𝗗𝗬 | To provide users with a personal, self-hosted music streaming service, offering control over their music library and playback experience.  🔥 Super Hot!

📅 Created: Feb 2018 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Self-hosted music streaming server
✅ Web interface for music playback and management
✅ Docker installation for ease of use
✅ Support for PostgreSQL database
✅ Mobile applications available for iOS and Android

Black Candy is a self-hosted music streaming server that allows users to manage and stream their personal music library. It provides a web interface for playback and management, with optional mobile applications for access on the go.

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Performing object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR on images using natural language queries through an efficient inference engine.
📅 Created: Mar 2026 • Updated: Jun 2026

✅ Natively multimodal Transformer model
✅ Object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR capabilities
✅ Inference engines for PyTorch (CUDA) and MLX (Apple Silicon)
✅ Paged and batch inference options
✅ Inference server deployment
✅ Interactive notebooks and playground

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Falcon Perception is a PyTorch inference engine for a natively multimodal, autoregressive Transformer model capable of performing object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR from natural language queries. It offers various inference engines, including paged and batch processing for PyTorch and MLX (Apple Silicon), and supports deployment via an inference server.

✅ Futuristic mobile hardware monitoring dashboard
✅ Integrates with LibreHardwareMonitor
✅ Visualizes system statistics (CPU, GPU, RAM, etc.)
✅ Remote web server for data fetching
✅ Configurable device management

CyberMon is a futuristic mobile hardware monitoring dashboard built with Svelte. It visualizes system statistics fetched from LibreHardwareMonitor, providing users with a clear overview of their device's performance on a mobile interface.

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📜 JavaScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automatically skip non-content segments like ads and intros on streaming platforms, providing a seamless viewing experience.
📅 Created: Jul 2022 • Updated: Jun 2026

•••••••••••••••••••••••

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Automatic skipping of ads, intros, recaps, and credits
✅ Support for major streaming services including Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Crunchyroll, and HBO
✅ Available as browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge
✅ Installable on Android via Firefox or Kiwi Browser
✅ Automatic DRM installation for streaming services


•••••••••••••••••••••••

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐ 552 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 58 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 8 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

•••••••••••••••••••••••

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This repository provides browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge that automatically skip advertisements, intros, recaps, and credits on various major streaming services. It aims to enhance the viewing experience by removing unwanted content segments.

•••••••••••••••••••••••

Loopi is an open-source desktop automation platform that allows users to build and run complex workflows locally. It offers visual workflow building, real browser automation, desktop control, system command execution, AI agent integration, and over 80 API integrations.
